SECURITY MODULES

COMPREHENSIVE AUDITING

Multi-cloud visibility across AWS and Azure — from VPC topology to CIS benchmarks, all in one unified plane.

Network Discovery Engine

Deep crawling across all VPCs and regions. Enumerates subnets, gateways, route tables, and elastic IPs in seconds.

VIEW LIVE TOPOLOGY MAP

CIS Benchmark Evaluator

Evaluates ingress and egress rules against all 142 CIS Foundations Benchmarks. Spot exposed resources instantly.

RUN BENCHMARK SCAN

Live Topology Map

Real-time force-directed graph. Visualize multi-cloud interconnections, attack vectors, and rogue nodes.

EXPLORE NETWORK GRAPH

Drift Detection & SSE Alerts

Continuous baseline monitoring. Stream live Server-Sent Events directly into your dashboard in real time.

VIEW AUDIT FINDINGS
